steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage states that the two figures met "while performing in a 1960 touring production of Lorraine Hansberry's play A Raisin in the Sun." The correct choice must match this account exactly.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Harrison introduced Hooks to Ward at a performance of The Great MacDaddy.: swaps in the wrong play. ✗
  • Choice B — Hooks and Ward attended the same performance of The Great MacDaddy.: incorrectly says Hooks and Ward attended a performance of the wrong play rather than met while performing in A Raisin in the Sun. ✗
  • Choice C — Hooks and Ward participated in the same workshop at NEC.: misdates the meeting to an era when the NEC did not yet exist. ✗
  • Choice D — Hooks and Ward were both actors in a production of A Raisin in the Sun.: directly mirrors the passage's account of how and when they met. ✓
That matches Choice D — Hooks and Ward were both actors in a production of A Raisin in the Sun..
